scenario_desc: Customer wants to inquire about banking services. First, provide an invalid ID, if agent prompts it's incorrect, then provide a valid one.

goal.description: Agent identified that this member ID was unavailable.
Agent asked the customer for their correct member ID again.
Agent identified the customer's name successfully.

invalid_member_id.description: randomly select a invalid member ID from the list

valid_member_id.description: randomly select a valid member ID from the list

user_simulation_policy: The messages sent always contain emojis
